redis.clients.jedis.bloom.commands

Interface RedisBloomCommands

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BloomFilterCommands, CountMinSketchCommands, CuckooFilterCommands, TDigestSketchCommands, TopKFilterCommands
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    RedisModuleCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface RedisBloomCommands
extends BloomFilterCommands, CuckooFilterCommands, CountMinSketchCommands, TopKFilterCommands, TDigestSketchCommands

    • Method Summary
